title: ra`ash #7493
definition:
1) to quake, shake
    1a) (Qal) to quake, shake
    1b) (Niphal) to be made to quake
    1c) (Hiphil)
        1c1) to cause to quake
        1c2) to cause to spring or leap (of horse)
